screen.title: Welcome to Tutora
screen.subtitle: Find the right tutor by budget, district, and subject in minutes.
screen.legal: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

error.title: Sign-in failed
error.cancelled: Sign-in was cancelled. Please try again.
error.generic: We could not sign you in. Please check your connection and try again.

discover.title: Find the right tutor
discover.description: Search by budget, district, subject, rating, format, and language — in minutes.

transparent.title: Clear and transparent
transparent.description: Compare verified tutors with real reviews. No guesswork, no word-of-mouth.

flexible.title: Learn your way
flexible.description: Online or in person, in the language you prefer, on a schedule that fits.

STUDENT.title: I’m a student or parent
STUDENT.description: Find and book trusted tutors that match your needs and budget.

TUTOR.title: I’m a tutor
TUTOR.description: Reach motivated students and grow a steady, predictable schedule.

role.title: How will you use Tutora?
role.subtitle: Choose your role to personalize your experience.
role.error: We could not save your choice. Please check your connection and try again.

chat.title: Messages
chat.emptyDescription: Message a tutor and your conversations will show up here.
chat.errorDescription: Please check your connection and try again.
chat.threadEmptyDescription: Say hello to start the conversation.
chat.retryFailed: Message failed to send. Tap to retry.

home.subtitle: Search verified tutors by subject, budget, and format.

search.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
search.errorDescription: We couldn’t load tutors. Please try again.

detail.notFoundDescription: This tutor may no longer be available.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the heart on a tutor to save them here.

comparison.title: Compare
comparison.subtitle: Comparing {{count}} of {{limit}} tutors
comparison.emptyDescription: Add tutors from your favorites to compare them side by side.

bar.hint: Pick at least one more to compare

savedSearches.empty: You haven’t saved any searches yet.
savedSearches.emptyHint: Save a search from the Search tab to reuse it later.

savedSearches.limitReached: You can save up to {{limit}} searches.

dashboard.title: Tutor dashboard
dashboard.description: Your tutoring tools are on the way — we’re building them now.
